description: Phase 12 seed corpus for health-ai-service RAG. Each article is adapted from public-domain medical sources (WHO, NIH MedlinePlus, CDC, NICE, EFSA, AASM). The kk articles are initial drafts derived from the ru versions and flagged for human review.
